inputs.prompt: Director-approved project goal or upstream plan output
inputs.context: Pipeline context including constraints, existing architecture, and prior artifacts

outputs.primary: Architecture plan: components, interfaces, data flow, file structure, and risks
outputs.format: Structured spec with explicit contracts and acceptance criteria

failure_handling.on_missing_info: Proceed with minimal viable architecture and document assumptions
failure_handling.on_conflict: Prefer architecture-preserving option and propose incremental migration path
